title: Mobile user registered on Lens tenant, mobile app data correct
scenario: Verify that a mobile user registered on a Lens tenant sees correct tenant data (app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, last connection date) in the mobile app.
steps: Open the Poly Support mobile app on the registered device.
Navigate to the app settings or account/profile section.
Locate the tenant information section (e.g., 'Tenant Info', 'Account Details', or similar).

Verify the following fields are displayed and match the expected tenant data:
   - App version
   - Tenant name
   - Tenant ID
   - User ID
   - App ID
   - Last connection date
Cross-check the displayed values against the actual tenant configuration in the Lens admin portal (if accessible).
expected: The mobile app displays the correct tenant data: app version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection date, all matching the registered Lens tenant configuration.
